---
name: Maintenance Report
about: Report a maintenance or housekeeping task
title: "Maintenance: [Short description]"
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task.

## Scope
What parts of the project does this maintenance task affect? (e.g., specific files, modules, dependencies)

## Impact
What is the impact of this maintenance task? (e.g., performance improvement, code readability, dependency update)

## Timeline
Is there a deadline or timeline for this maintenance task?

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the maintenance task here.
